rows.label: qev019401_MSG0001
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!
I've finally finished analyzing the Data Units![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Honestly... everyone at the lab was planning
something absolutely incredible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0003
rows.name:
It was done in secret from Headquarters, so they
probably didn't tell me out of concern for my career...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0004
rows.name:
But I'm a bit frustrated being left out.
I wanted to do this fun research with them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Listen, I'm planning to take over this research.
I will absolutely make it a reality someday![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask in detail about the contents
of the Data Units.

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0020
rows.name: Support

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0021
rows.name: Cheer on the delighted Kirsty.

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0006
rows.name:
Oh no... come to think of it, I hadn't told you anything
about what the "Next-Generation Frontier Net" is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Thank you!
...Wait, I'm sorry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I got all excited without even talking about what the
"Next-Generation Frontier Net" is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Listen... I hope you won't laugh, but the objective of
this plan is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0010
rows.name:
It's to connect the myriad stars spreading across the
universe through Frontier Net, and share all information
and resources.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0011
rows.name:
The plan even stated that they would connect the planets
of the solar system and newly discovered planets[ST:wide ]—like
this Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hehe, elite researchers gathered together and secretly
cooked up this ridiculous idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Don't you think it's wonderful? If this is realized, the people
living in the universe could truly become one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0031
rows.name: Agree with the dream-filled plan.

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0040
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0041
rows.name: Be amazed at the absurd plan.

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0014
rows.name:
I knew you would understand. You have a screw loose
in a good way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0015
rows.name:
But you know, new technology is always born from ideas
so revolutionary they leave you dumbfounded.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0016
rows.name:
I will absolutely make this plan a reality. Yes, of course,
I know it's impossible right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0017
rows.name:
20 years from now, 100 years from now, it doesn't matter.
I want to plant that seed now and nurture it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Say, won't you help me gather the massive amount of
Miranium and Arc Sand Ore required for that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0019
rows.name:
I want you to be my comrade in giving form to this
extraordinary dream... Will you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thank you... Then I'm counting on you. With that much,
I can start the basic research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Let's spread the Frontier Net expanding into a new world
with our own hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0022
rows.name:
I thought they were researching something in secret...
To think they were plotting such an extraordinary plan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Hehe, I certainly can't report this to Headquarters.
Let's do it just by ourselves until we have a prospect
for realization.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0024
rows.name:
I am proceeding with a more detailed analysis of the
information obtained from the Data Units.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0025
rows.name: I leave the collection of Miranium and Arc Sand Ore to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0026
rows.name:
The universe-scale Frontier Net my comrades
dreamed of...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0027
rows.name:
With a plan this massive, just proceeding with basic
research requires an enormous amount of Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0028
rows.name:
You're the only one I can rely on... Please let me know
when you've gathered the Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0050
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0051
rows.name: Hand over 20000gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0060
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0061
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0029
rows.name:
Thank you.
This much is plenty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0030
rows.name:
All I need is Arc Sand Ore, and I can start the research
for the time being.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0031
rows.name: If you have it, please hand that over too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0032
rows.name:
It is a huge amount after all...
It won't be gathered that easily, huh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0033
rows.name:
But I believe you can gather any massive amount of
Miranium. I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0034
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—It seems you haven't gathered the
Arc Sand Ore yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0035
rows.name:
All I need is Arc Sand Ore, and I can start the research
for the time being.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0036
rows.name:
I'm counting on you for one more job. I'll proceed with
the analysis in the meantime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0037
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—It seems you've gathered the
Arc Sand Ore as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Thank you, excellent work as always. I've hit a bit of a
dead end with the analysis over here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0039
rows.name: Say, are you acquainted with Tobias?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0070
rows.name: Favor

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0071
rows.name:
State a favorable opinion that he
isn't a bad guy.

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0080
rows.name: Disgust

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0081
rows.name:
State a negative opinion that he is
the worst kind of man.

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0040
rows.name:
Is that so... To me, he just looks like a greedy man who uses
Frontier Net only for his own sake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0041
rows.name:
I share that opinion. He's a greedy man who only uses
Frontier Net for his own profit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Listen, while proceeding with the analysis of the
Data Units, I discovered that there is a sixth Data Unit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0043
rows.name:
When I traced its whereabouts, for some reason, it led
me to Tobias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0044
rows.name:
If we have that, the missing pieces in the blueprints
should be filled in a bit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0045
rows.name:
If you know him, could you negotiate and have him hand
over the Data Unit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0046
rows.name:
It seems he detests me, and I... don't have the confidence
to negotiate with him calmly either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'm sorry to force this unpleasant role on you... but please,
you are the only comrade I can rely on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0048
rows.name: It seems that Tobias has the sixth Data Unit, FN098.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0049
rows.name: I don't know what kind of scam he pulled to get it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0050
rows.name:
A guy like that absolutely shouldn't have his hands on it.
That is... the dream left by my comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0051
rows.name:
How was it?
Did Tobias have the Data Unit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0052
rows.name: ...I see, so that record wasn't a lie. And what did he say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0053
rows.name:
Knowing that man, he probably demanded some
ridiculous compensation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0090
rows.name: Disgust

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0091
rows.name: Tell her that he demanded a massive sum.

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0100
rows.name: Favor

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0101
rows.name: Tell her that he disabled the encryption.

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0054
rows.name:
A very "him" demand... I'm sorry for pushing such a nasty
role onto you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0055
rows.name:
Even so, what does he plan to do on Mira by gathering
so much money...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0056
rows.name:
No way... Even I, who was on the research team, took a
considerable amount of time to analyze it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0057
rows.name:
How could a guy like that break the encryption
so easily...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0058
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—No, anyway, please lend me the Data Unit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0059
rows.name:
We don't have time to be involved with a guy like that right
now. I have to get to work on the research quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0060
rows.name: Thank you... It's exactly as I thought.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0061
rows.name:
Only with this Data Unit do the five Data Units you gathered
take form as a single blueprint...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0062
rows.name:
It's still a long road ahead, but the research has become
much easier to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0063
rows.name:
Then I'll get to work on the research right away.
This is my thanks for this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0064
rows.name: Hah! What do you mean "easier to do"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0065
rows.name:
Building Frontier Net's network is out of your field of
expertise, ain't it?! That kind of amateur misunderstanding
is what's most terrifying![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0066
rows.name:
What are you doing with such naive prospects when we're
talking about developing universe-scale infrastructure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0067
rows.name:
Wha-?! Why are you here? And why do you know about
the Next-Generation Frontier Net...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0068
rows.name:
Heh, since way back you really do seem to have it
together, but you're missing a piece somewhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0069
rows.name:
Say, [ST:playername ].
Don't you think so too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0111
rows.name:
Agree with Tobias that she does have
that side to her.

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0120
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0121
rows.name:
State that Kirsty always makes
calm judgments.

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0070
rows.name:
Hehe, you observe well! Most guys get fooled by
her outward appearance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0071
rows.name:
Even when we were on the White Whale, we all used to
cover for this little lady's mistakes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0072
rows.name:
Well, I guess being roughed up by BLADE means she's
made more progress than when she was on the White Whale?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0073
rows.name:
Back then, we all used to cover for this little lady's
mistakes quite often.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0074
rows.name:
...Whatever. The Data Unit I handed over has the researcher
roster. Try searching for my name there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0075
rows.name:
What are you saying?
There's no way it would be............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0076
rows.name: ...Wha-?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0077
rows.name:
Frontier Net Network 3rd Development Department,
Tobias...! Why is your name here?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0078
rows.name:
Because I was building Frontier Net there with you!
We must have crossed paths a few times, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0079
rows.name:
Well, during the accident when we reached Mira, I had to
swap my facial B.B. parts with someone else's, so I don't
blame you for not recognizing me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0080
rows.name:
To think a selfish and greedy guy like you was there...
It's a lie...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0081
rows.name:
...That's why you're a softie bastard. What do you plan to
do about the funds required for the research?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0082
rows.name:
Headquarters ain't gonna fork over cash for such an
absurd plan anytime soon, ya know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0083
rows.name: That's... I'll manage it somehow from now on...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0084
rows.name: There's no way you can "manage it somehow", you idiot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0085
rows.name:
I just sent all the cash I've hoarded up until now to
your account.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0086
rows.name:
Use that to fund the development of the Next-Generation
Frontier Net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0087
rows.name:
Also, I'll take over the network research, so be a good
little girl and start your specialized Data Probe research![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0088
rows.name: Understand? Well then, I'm outta here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0089
rows.name:
Well, you did a good job gathering the Data Units. To tell
the truth, I was supposed to do that once the cash was
saved up, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0090
rows.name:
You saved me the trouble, you idiot! As the surviving
development members, we will absolutely give form to
everyone's dream![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0091
rows.name: Umm... What does this mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0130
rows.name: Support

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0131
rows.name:
Pat her on the shoulder and say it's good
that she has more comrades.

rows.label: qev019401_JNK0140
rows.name: Alert

rows.label: qev019401_SEL0141
rows.name:
Warn her to be careful, saying he might be
trying to use it as a tool to make money.

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0092
rows.name:
Comrade? That greedy man who only thinks about
money...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0093
rows.name:
But, he said he invested all of his money into this
research...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019401_MSG0095
rows.name:
Umm... I'm sorry, I don't seem to be able to swallow the
situation very well...[ST:wait ]
